CLAIM FILED BY MARIA OPLE, BELENDA MONSADA SET FOR AUG-20-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-10-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. PENDING FURTHER HEARING, DEFENDANT SHALL CONTINUE TO PAY #150 PER MONTH ON OR BEFORE THE 15TH OF THE MONTH. THE 1-10-11 HEARING WILL BE A DEBTOR'S EXAMINATION. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR IN PERSON AND BRING WITH HER ALL RECORDS AND DOCUMENTS PERTAINING TO HOUSEHOLD INCOME, BANK AND OTHER ACCOUNTS AND ASSETS AND LIABILITIES.

DEBTOR AGREES TO MAKE PAYMENTS TO THE CREDITOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 ON THE 15TH AND 30TH OF EVERY MONTH BEGINNING AUGUST 15TH, 2011 UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY BELENDA MONSADA IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $150.00 OR MORE ON THE 15TH OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING JUNE 15, 2010. PAYMENTS MUST BE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF BY THE FIFTEENTH OF EACH MONTH. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO AUGUST 20, 2010 AT 8:30 AM. DEFENDANT SHALL APPEAR WITH UPDATED FINANCIAL INFORMATION. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
